name: iboss
explanation: iboss is a logs-only vendor security tile (Secure Web Gateway / Zero Trust). The integration ships no Python check class - the `datadog_checks/iboss/` directory contains only `__about__.py`, `__init__.py`, and a sample conf - and the spec.yaml defines no `instances` block at all, only a `logs` template that listens for syslog (`type: tcp/udp`) on a user-chosen port. There is no upstream service to probe, no metric endpoint, and no host/port the Agent would dial out to. Setup is operator-driven: configure the iboss appliance to forward syslog to the Agent and wire dashboards/SIEM rules. This is pattern N (logs-only / instrumentation), so auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
notes: Spec has no instances block (logs template only). No check.py exists. Pattern N (logs-only) - same shape as sidekiq, but with syslog ingestion instead of DogStatsD.
